title: phaenopyrum subvillosum
intro: Phaenopyrum subvillosum, also known as the Chinese tree-of-heaven or silver maple, is a deciduous tree native to China and Southeast Asia. Its bark, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phaenopyrum subvillosum include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to treat various ailments.
